items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic Baguette Medium Handbag, Trousseau fabric, FF jacquard pattern in dove grey. Accented with tonal leather details and FF buckle. Features a front flap, magnetic closure, internal compartment with suede lining and zip pocket, vintage gold hardware. The bag comes with a removable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Model: F6221, Dimensions: 27*6*15cm

items.name_en: Large Monogram
items.name_cn:
Large Monogram
New FENDI First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first FENDI bag, overturning previous shapes. Metal trim and large logo lock combined with the body design deconstructs architectural art and fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for evening clutching, and crossbody gives a high-end street chic feel!
Large Size 32.5x15x23.5cm

items.name_en: 【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Replica with Full Counter Packaging】
items.name_cn:
【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Replica with Full Counter Packaging】
【With Box】Fendi latest trending bag Small Simply FENDI handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s and named for its elegant basic design. Jacquard fabric material, decorated with the iconic brown FF pattern. The front is decorated with a deep brown patent leather iconic FF decoration. Features a deep brown knotted calf leather long zipper puller, with an internal lined compartment and gold metal fittings. The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder carrying.
【With Box】
Model: 3023#
Size: 22×13×4.5CM

items.name_en: Small White
items.name_cn:
Small White
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FEND1, subverting the previous bag shape, metal trim large Logo lock plus body design combines architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Handheld for evening parties is full of aura, crossbody also has a high-end street chic feel!
Large 127 Dimensions 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small 129 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm
Mini 56831 Dimensions 11.5x5.5x10cm
